blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,637 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 21°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
